overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a rainy industrial dockyard in a video game. The character moves from a covered storage area with green canvas roofing and sandbags, through a metal gate, and along wooden train tracks toward a foggy harbor with ships, warehouses, and industrial smokestacks in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial storage area with sandbags and supplies

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the canvas canopy through the industrial storage area

notable_agents.action: worker in apron standing near wooden crates, appearing to handle goods

entered.detail: green tarpaulin roofing supported by metal framework covering the storage area
vertical steel beams supporting the canopy structure
stacked burlap sandbags arranged along the walkway
stacked wooden cargo boxes and barrels
black iron gate marking the exit from the covered area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a green canvas canopy in an industrial dock storage area. The ground is muddy dirt, and sandbags line the path. A worker in an apron stands near wooden crates to the left. The camera moves forward toward a metal gate at the end of the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden railway dock with harbor view

events.description: exits the covered storage area through the metal gate into the open dock

agents.ego_description: stepping out from under the canopy onto the wooden dock, continuing along the train tracks

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running along the wooden dock toward the harbor
weathered wooden planks forming the walkway surface
calm water of the industrial harbor visible through the haze
tall wooden electrical poles with crossbars lining the dock
tan canvas tent structures used for storage along the dockside

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered storage area through a metal gate into the open air. The scene opens onto a wooden dock with train tracks running along it. The harbor is visible through the hazy rain, with distant ships and utility poles lining the walkway. Canvas tents appear on the left side of the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with multiple railway tracks

events.description: camera turns slightly left toward the harbor while passing the train shed

agents.ego_description: walking along the railway tracks toward the crowded waterfront area, passing other dock workers

notable_agents.action: dock worker walking ahead on the wooden planks alongside the tracks

entered.detail: large open-sided wooden structure covering railway tracks
industrial chimneys emitting smoke in the distant background
brick and metal warehouse structures along the dockside
large vessels moored in the foggy harbor water

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the wooden dock, approaching and passing a large train shed. The waterfront becomes busier with other pedestrians walking along the tracks. Industrial buildings and smokestacks line the right side while ships are visible in the foggy harbor. The camera turns slightly toward the water as it moves through the active dock area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered industrial storage area out into a sprawling, rain-soaked harbor. It begins under a green canvas canopy on muddy ground lined with sandbags, passing a worker near wooden crates while moving toward a metal gate. As the camera exits the covered walkway, the scene opens onto a wooden dock where train tracks stretch forward into a hazy, rainy atmosphere filled with distant ships and utility poles. The perspective then continues along the dock, passing a large train shed and moving through an active area with pedestrians and canvas tents. Finally, the view shifts toward the waterfront, revealing a dense industrial skyline of buildings and smokestacks emerging from the fog.
